content: For this small foundation milestone, table stakes are real namespace authority, strict dependency-ordered publication, clean external consumers, exact version and API baselines, metadata/support/changelog, least-privilege release execution, immutable digest/provenance evidence, idempotent preflight, and explicit recovery. Differentiators are fail-closed evidence linking registry bytes to source, matrixed external consumers, and machine-readable candidate compatibility. New module families, generalized release platforms, 1.0 stability, and broad SBOM/signing machinery should be deferred.
